intro: Pilocosta erythrophylla, also known as Pilocarpus erythrophyllus or Jaborandi, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Pilocosta erythrophylla include its ability to stimulate hair growth, improve skin conditions, and aid in the treatment of certain neurological disorders. The bioactive constituents of this plant include pilocarpine, pilocarpidin, and pilosine, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Pilocosta erythrophylla is commonly used in herbal preparations such as tea infusions, extracts, and capsules, often marketed for its potential to promote hair growth and improve scalp health.
